report.summary: Researched yield-bearing stablecoins market ($20B+, 6 protocols), wrote comprehensive learn guide with 3-tab interactive layout, added SEO metadata via layout.tsx, and added page to PUBLISH_QUEUE

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Yield-bearing stablecoins market surpassed $20B in circulation — JPMorgan predicts growth from 6% to 50% of total stablecoin market
Ethena USDe/sUSDe: ~$5.9B market cap, ~3.5% APY, contracted from $14.8B peak TVL in Oct 2025 due to funding rate compression
Sky USDS/sUSDS: ~$10B USDS + ~$4.6B sUSDS, Sky Savings Rate ~4.25%, most battle-tested model (ex-MakerDAO)
Ondo USDY: ~$690M market cap, T-bill backed, institutional-grade, 4-5% APY
Usual USD0++: 13% APY but requires 4-year lock, RWA-backed, novel governance model
Mountain USDM and Frax sfrxUSD also researched — smaller but growing protocols
GENIUS Act (signed into law) created regulatory clarity for compliant stablecoins, driving institutional inflows
Chain abstraction research also completed but page already existed at /learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026 — avoided duplication

sections.title: Content Created
items: Yield-Bearing Stablecoins Guide 2026 — comprehensive ~775-line learn page with 3 interactive tabs
Tab 1: What Are Yield-Bearing Stablecoins? (overview, traditional vs YBS comparison, yield sources, market context)
Tab 2: Top Protocols Compared (comparison table of 6 protocols: Ethena, Sky, Ondo, Mountain, Usual, Frax with APY/TVL/mechanism/risk)
Tab 3: How to Earn Yield (step-by-step guides for each protocol, risk management, advanced strategies, common mistakes)
Added 6 internal links to existing degen0x pages (ethena-usde-guide, staking-apy, lending-comparison, genius-act-stablecoin-guide, defi-yields, tax-calculator)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag: 'Yield-Bearing Stablecoins Guide 2026: Earn 3-13% APY | degen0x' (58 chars)
Meta description: 155 chars targeting 'yield bearing stablecoins' primary keyword
13 keywords covering long-tail variations (susde apy, sky usds savings rate, ondo usdy, etc.)
OpenGraph configured with type: article, publishedTime, authors
Twitter card with summary_large_image
Layout.tsx created for server-side metadata export (page is client component for tab interactivity)
6 internal links added to resources section targeting high-value existing pages

report.notes: Chain abstraction page was initially created but found to duplicate existing /learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026. Pivoted to single deliverable (yield-bearing stablecoins) to avoid content duplication. No interactive components needed beyond existing tab pattern (useState). Fixed TS syntax error (malformed ternary on line 206) during QA.
